reviews.review_description: Zoe is a great platform for VR

Zoe is great platform for students to create virtual reality and mixed reality experiences. The app is easy to use. The Zoe staff is very intentional with teaching and learning with VR creation and education, providing lots of resources and responsive support. Join their Creators Program to be inspired by their community!
I love the game but there is people in zoe

When i first downloaded this app, i played for 2 hours straight. I loved it. Now everytime i open the app, its frozen in an empty room with no gameplay options. I have tried restarting the app, restarting the console, uninstalling and reinstalling, and clearing all data and starting from scratch. Nothing will fix the freeze. I really loved it the first time i played it. I wish customer service would reach out to help me.

developer_response.body:
We are so sorry you are having a technical issue. We believe our support team has already responded swiftly to your email and is trying to find a fix for your account. 

We hope to get you back up and running with Zoe fast and apologize for the trouble.

reviews.review_title: Say hello to a new way of learning
reviews.review_description:
ZOE is an amazing immersive learning tool! Students can learn the basics of VR development with zero code and teachers and students can create custom virtual and immersive learning experiences. Zoe Immersive is like a magic school bus for the 21st century, letting you:

Build a virtual museum on Mars (because why not?) ️
Host meetings in pirate ship galleys (arrrr, mateys!) ‍☠️
Create a science lab in space.
Create a restaurant with interactions to practice language learning. Basically, it's like dreaming on steroids. You can create anything, anywhere, and anyone can do it (no coding required, thank goodness!)
You need to provide birthday, email etc before you can even play. I removed this immediately. I still gave it two stars because it might be ok once you create an account.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your note on registration. We understand registering can be a pain. 

Like many other creation based games, we require registration in Zoe for the system to function.  Every creator has it's own profile in order to create with their friends or classmates.

While we hope to modify our registration process in the future to be more flexible, for now it is the best way to manage an App like Zoe and allows us to provide you with a free version that you can start creating with right away. 

We hope you will still give it a try!

Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions: community@zoeimmersive.com

reviews.review_description: I have noticed a trend in which 99.99999 percent of apps that want my email before I am allowed to try out a single feature are scams. No thank you.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jas, We understand registering can be a pain. 

In our case this allows Zoe function properly and to insure that Zoe is a safe app for education contexts.

Every creator has a profile, it's own avatar and a private space where they can invite friends and colleagues. 

While we hope to be able to remove registration in future versions, for now this is how we're able to provide a free version with all creation features. 

We hope you'll give us a try!

Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions: community@zoeimmersive.com

reviews.review_description: All of the other reviews helped me to decide whether or not to get the game except the one who said it sucks I rated you a 5 star how good the game is I love art and creating sufficient thanks for making a artsy game for all the artsy people in our world and I love that it was free it help me so if I didn't like it I would not have to wast money on just a game thanks again.

reviews.review_title: I DK what to put here

reviews.review_description:
update
when do you add the update to be able to create offline without having the mandatory connection activated?


Reply:

hi, thanks for the reply, I can guarantee you that as soon as I can use the app offline the first thing I'll do is give it five stars and then use it often! 



potentially it's a good app, but the fact of being forced to always keep the internet connection active during the entire use of the app takes away a lot of my interest, because I love playing and creating exclusively offline, why not make the app offline? I don't think it has to access resources, why don't you include all the resources it accesses in the app?

developer_response.body:
Update: We have not been able to focus on putting the app offline yet. It requires quite a bit of refactoring from our side. We have many online features at the moment that we would need to deactivate. 

That said, we hear you, and we agree it would be nice to work offline for many reasons. It is on our roadmap so we will keep you updated !
Hopefully you will give us another chance with some new content coming out.
We hope to be more than a model spawner and become a game creator tool. We would love to hear what features you would like to see as we continue working on updates.

reviews.review_description: The recent update is going to be tomorrow morning its exciting right!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Zoe is what Meta wanted to be
reviews.review_description: From the tutorial I could already sense that this app was doing essentially what Meta’s Horizons was supposed to be except more attractive, much better executed, and less of a barrier for entry for people who don’t code. Once I realized you could upload your 3D rooms or assets to sketchfab to download into your Zoe environment my mind started racing with possibilities. This is exactly the kind of app I was after.

reviews.review_title: Zoe is an amazing creation tool.
reviews.review_description:
Update;
Following a fast response from the developer assuring me that Zoe will be updated regularly with assets and programing tools added regularly - and that I can currently climb up rocks and ramps using the current program tools available - I suppose the limits being the users imagination  ( my bad lol), 
I have therefore updated my previous review ( see below ) from a three star to a five star review which Zoe and the developer's truly deserve;
( Thank you developer's )


Zoe has great potential and could be an excellent building game/tool, however currently, it is too basic with only a few 3d assets and audio assets.

There is only a very few programing options and Zoe needs a lot more added to make it interesting.

landscape building area is very flat and boring lacking the ability to walk up hills or climb the rocks placed in the area, for example; I would have loved to build a house on top of a rock and to be able to go up there and look at the landscape I have designed below or look up at the house /castle I placed on top of a hill. 

Hopefully this will be added in the future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the insightful feedback. We will definitely be adding more programing features as we update the app regularly. Tell us which ones you'd like to see first by sending us an email to info@zoe.com!

If you place your own rock and/or create a ramp you can actually walk up and see the view if the slope is not too high. You can also create your own elevator by moving a platform with the "move to" action. Just make sure to enable collisions on your assets so that it's possible for you to walk on them instead of going through them!

reviews.review_description: I’m an educator who has been using Zoe for the past three years and it has always been amazing! Now with the ability to build environments with other people this software is a game changer in the classroom and for personal use. I cannot recommend this enough if you are looking to introduce your students to digital storytelling and creating 3D environments!

reviews.review_title: Excellent app for new world creators!
reviews.review_description: Easy interface and a great way for kids to learn how to build worlds in VR without coding!   Can use Sketchfab assets so you’re not limited to primitives either.  Every school adopting VR should integrate this app into their curriculum.
I've tried 6 times to run this app. Just won't load for me.

developer_response.body: We apologies for the loading issues you are having. We would love to help troubleshoot the issue for you. Also make sure you have an active internet connection when you try out Zoe. Please reach out to us at support@zoeimmersive.com

reviews.review_title: VR in the Classroom for a Teacher NewBie
reviews.review_description: I've enjoyed exploring how to create a scene and then creating one using the Zoe app. The tutorials and support for educators is outstanding. The app continues to add new features and provides the just right level of rigor and joy for my middle school students. During our pilot of Zoe, we were able to design, code, debug, iterate and play. This has been a wonderful learning adventure for me as their teacher. I really appreciate how Zoe can be used in the learning environment in both CS and non-CS classes.
